conditions.critical_condition_basis: coelution point of polymers with different molecular weights

field_evidence.critical_condition_basis: Analytical LCCC analysis used a column... The column temperature was varied to achieve CAP condition for the polymers of interest.
field_evidence.critical_component: TCAP and tE,CAP of Ls-PS... are measured as 14.8 °C/7.4 min
field_evidence.column_name: Analytical LCCC analysis used a column (Nucleosil C18, 250 × 4.6 mm, 100 Å, 5 μm)
field_evidence.temperature_celsius: TCAP and tE,CAP of Ls-PS... are measured as 14.8 °C/7.4 min
field_evidence.pore_size: Analytical LCCC analysis used a column (Nucleosil C18, 250 × 4.6 mm, 100 Å, 5 μm)
field_evidence.flow_rate: The eluent was CH2Cl2/CH3CN (58/42, v/v) at a flow rate of 0.5 mL/min

conditions.notes: Ls-PS refers to linear PS with saturated DPE end-groups.
conditions.physical_address: Department of Chemistry, The University of Memphis, Memphis, Tennessee 38154, United States; Division of Advanced Materials Science and Department of Chemistry, Pohang University of Science and Technology (POSTECH), Pohang 37673, Korea
